message:
feat(security)(ft-3xek9): redactor blocklist for newer AI provider tokens

Pre-ft-3xek9 the blocklist covered only OpenAI (sk-/sk-proj-),
Anthropic (sk-ant-), and 3 GitHub variants. Newer providers and
formats leaked unredacted through robot/MCP/audit surfaces:

Added prefixed-key patterns:
- xAI                       (xai-<40+>)
- Groq                      (gsk_<40+>)
- Google API / Vertex / Gemini (AIza<35>)
- Google OAuth 2.0 access   (ya29.<20+>)
- GitHub fine-grained PATs  (github_pat_<40+>)
- Hugging Face              (hf_<30+>)
- Replicate                 (r8_<30+>)
- Anyscale                  (esecret_<30+>)
- Perplexity                (pplx-<40+>)

Widened OpenAI alternation to include sk-svcacct-/sk-admin-
variants alongside the existing sk-proj-.

Added contextual ai_provider_keyed_value pattern for providers
that don't carry a distinct value prefix (Cohere, Mistral,
Together, Fireworks, DeepInfra, Nvidia API, Databricks,
Azure-OpenAI) — keyed on the variable name beside the secret.

Reordered SECRET_PATTERNS to fire anthropic_key before
openai_key — the broader sk- alternation matches sk-ant-
otherwise, mislabelling Anthropic tokens as OpenAI.

Fixture coverage: 16 new tests (1 per provider + Cohere/Mistral/
Together/Fireworks/Azure-OpenAI keyed-value paths + Anthropic
api03/admin01 variants + OpenAI service-account variant + a
no-false-positive prose check + a multi-pattern detect()
inventory). All 23 redactor:: tests pass under
--no-default-features.

Bead: ft-3xek9 (P2 security-audit, redactor coverage gap).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
